statements.sql:
insert into `bravo_contact` (`name`, `email`, `message`, `status`, `create_user`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('Ali', 'asif@rocketdigitaltech.com', 'Hello http://virenaretreat.com,
 
If you’re looking to boost your website’s visibility, I can help you achieve top Google rankings.
 
I’ll prepare a complete SEO plan with actionable steps and potential growth insights for your products or services.
 
Once you share your target keywords and target market, I’ll send a full proposal.
 
Best Regards,
Asif', 'sent', '', '2026-06-03 07:58:54', '2026-06-03 07:58:54')
bindings:
Hello http://virenaretreat.com,
 
If you’re looking to boost your website’s visibility, I can help you achieve top Google rankings.
 
I’ll prepare a complete SEO plan with actionable steps and potential growth insights for your products or services.
 
Once you share your target keywords and target market, I’ll send a full proposal.
 
Best Regards,
Asif

    Best Regards,\r\n
    Asif
